lore:quest.name: Embermarch
lore:quest.description: Every twentieth day the seal exhales and the Corrupted march on Elderfall. Roderic asks one thing: be standing in the square when the next outbreak breaks — and still standing when it is done. Dawnbreaker waits for whoever manages it.
steps: Accept the quest from Captain Roderic Hale.
Wait for the next outbreak (every 20th day — ask Roderic how long).
Defend the village until every outbreak wave is broken.
The quest completes automatically at the outbreak victory.
